notes: Previous gen; H100 replaced in training; still deployed for inference
Current dominant training GPU. TokenPowerBench measured on 4xH100 node. Energy rises faster than parameter count within model families.
2-3x more tokens/watt than H100; GB200 NVL72 rack at 120kW. Liquid cooling required.
163kW per NVL144 rack; shipping 2025-2026. Liquid cooling standard.
Announced; ~300kW/rack projected. ~5x H100 efficiency expected from process + architecture gains.
Projected 600kW/rack by 2027; ~17x H100 efficiency. Requires next-gen liquid cooling.
Google-only; ~1.2x H100 on Gemini workloads; TPU pod architecture. High utilization due to Google's scale.
Most efficient publicly known chip for LLM at scale. ~1.9x H100 per watt.
Claims 4x perf/$ vs H100 for training; AWS-only. 64-chip UltraServer at ~95kW.
iPhone/MacBook on-device inference; RAM streaming from flash storage. 95%+ utilization since device-level batching is near 1. ~6x H100 per watt for capable tasks.
